message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam actor {
  ArrowColor #AAAAAA
  BackgroundColor #E4E5F0
  BorderColor #000000
}
skinparam boundary {
  ArrowColor #AAAAAA
  BackgroundColor #E4E5F0
  BorderColor #000000
}
skinparam control {
  ArrowColor #AAAAAA
  BackgroundColor #E4E5F0
  BorderColor #000000
}
skinparam entity {
  ArrowColor #AAAAAA
  BackgroundColor #E4E5F0
  BorderColor #000000
}
skinparam ext {
  ArrowColor #AAAAAA
  BackgroundColor #E4E5F0
  BorderColor #000000
}
skinparam object {
  ArrowColor #AAAAAA
  BackgroundColor #E4E5F0
  BorderColor #000000
}
skinparam participant {
  ArrowColor #AAAAAA
  BackgroundColor #E4E5F0
  BorderColor #000000
}
skinparam usecase {
  ArrowColor #AAAAAA
  BackgroundColor #E4E5F0
  BorderColor #000000
}

actor "TaskControl" as TaskControl
boundary "Reins_Agent" as Reins_Agent
control "ExecCommands" as ExecCommands
entity "HostRegistry" as HostRegistry

rectangle "loop [all_clients]" {
  TaskControl -> Reins_Agent : [01] identified_key
  rectangle "connection check"
  Reins_Agent -> ExecCommands : [02] check(identified_key)
  activate ExecCommands
  ExecCommands -> ExecCommands : [03] varid?(identified_key)
  deactivate ExecCommands
  ExecCommands -x Reins_Agent : [04] status
  Reins_Agent --x TaskControl : [05] status
}
rectangle "logging status"
TaskControl -> HostRegistry : [06] rewrite_status(identified_key, status)
activate HostRegistry
HostRegistry -> HostRegistry : [07] set_status(identified_key, IPaddress, status)
deactivate HostRegistry
HostRegistry -> HostRegistry : [08] store()
deactivate HostRegistry
HostRegistry --x TaskControl : [09] true or false
@enduml
```
